future_leakage_features.issue: EXP-010 measured whether the directional extreme updated within the next 20 bars after correction end, then attached it as a clustering input on later rows.
EXP-010 measured bars until future directional extreme update after correction end, then attached it as a clustering input on later rows.

duplicate_checks_required.ema27_slope_pct_vs_ema27_speed_pct: ema27_speed_pct was identical in construction to ema27_slope_pct in EXP-010 before speed_change was selected.
duplicate_checks_required.ema200_slope_pct_vs_ema200_speed_pct: ema200_speed_pct was identical in construction to ema200_slope_pct in EXP-010 before speed_change was selected.

correction_definition: Continuous close-to-close movement against current EMA direction; first bar back in trend direction ended the correction.

transition_matrix_method.why_probability_1_not_market_sequence: With self-transitions removed, two states can only change 1->2 or 2->1, so transition probability 1.00 is a counting artifact of excluding persistence, not evidence of a market sequence.
